title: Contact - Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats
headings: h3: and the Hazel Grove Lib Dems
h2: Sign up for email updates...
text_excerpt: Contact - Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats Skip to main content Hazel Grove Liberal Democrats Vote Lib Dem Get involved Local news Our campaigns Campaign wins Lisa Smart MP Our local teams Our party Contact Donate Join Donate Join Get involved Get emails Display a poster Andrew Stunell Fund Our campaigns Protect Our Community Park at Tangshutt Fields An additional hospital for Stockport NHS dentists Fair adoption pay Save our green belt Community-led housing Stop sewage Marple's World Heritage Speed Camera Campaign Illegal off-road biking Save Hazel Grove's NatWest Branch Save post office services in High Lane Save Stockport Post Office Campaign wins Specialist status for Stepping Hill Save our ticket offices Offerton fire crews saved New leisure hub for Marple Preserve the Green Belt Save Central Library Preserving Chadkirk Chapel Saving the 375 bus Rail services on the Rose Hill line Our local teams Bredbury & Woodley Bredbury Green & Romiley Hazel Grove Manor Marple North Marple South & High Lane Norbury & Woodsmoor Offerton Our party What we stand for Get updates Contact Lisa Smart MP and the Hazel Grove Lib Dems Do you have a question or an issue we can help with? Please get in touch! Email: enquiries@lisasmart.org.uk Phone: 0161 406 7070 Address: Hazel Grove Constituency Liberal Democrats, 34 Stockport Road, Romiley, Stockport SK6 3AA­ If you are contacting us with a piece of casework, please ensure you include your name, address and contact details, as well as the details of the issue. You will receive a confirmation of receipt of your email, and we will get back to you as soon as possible. Sign up for email updates... Oops! Please check the fields below and submit again. Looks like there was a problem with the submission. Please check the fields below and try again. Form successfully submitted First Name * Last Name * Email Address * You can opt-out at any time Postcode The Liberal Democrats may use the information you provide, including your political opinions, to further our objectives and share it with our elected representatives. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy: libdems.org.uk/privacy . You can exercise your rights and withdraw your consent to future communications by contacting us: data.protection@libdems.org.uk or: DPO, Lib Dems, 66 Buckingham Gate, London, SW1E 6AU. Sign-up Our casework team operate in line with our Office Standards Policy . The Liberal Democrats will use your contact details to send you information on the topics you have requested. Any data we gather will be used in accordance with our privacy policy at www.libdems.org.uk/privacy . To exercise your legal data rights, email: data.protection@libdems.org.uk . We take accessibility and your data privacy seriously. Read our accessibility statement and cookie policy . Promoted by the Liberal Democrats , First Floor, 66 Buckingham Gate, London SW1E 6AU. Website by Prater Raines . This website uses cookies Please select the types of cookies you want to allow. Essential These are necessary for the website to function properly. Analytics These help us to understand how our visitors use our website. Marketing These allow us to display content from other websites that track you for advertising purposes.
